briefing:
## 🌍 Top 5 Global Fintech News

- **[Fintech founder charged with fraud; AI app found to be humans in the Philippines](https://techcrunch.com/2025/04/10/fintech-founder-charged-with-fraud-after-ai-shopping-app-found-to-be-powered-by-humans-in-the-philippines/)** — *Hacker News* — A fintech founder faces fraud charges after their supposedly AI-powered shopping app was discovered to be operated by human workers in the Philippines.

- **[Americans see their savings vanish in Synapse fintech crisis](https://www.cnbc.com/2024/11/22/synapse-bankruptcy-thousands-of-americans-see-their-savings-vanish.html)** — *Hacker News* — Thousands of Americans lost access to their savings following the bankruptcy of Synapse, a fintech middleware company, raising urgent questions about consumer protections in embedded finance.

- **[Lloyds, Bank of Scotland and Halifax apps showed customers other users' transactions](https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c4g23npxpwgo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss)** — *BBC Business* — A serious data privacy incident at Lloyds Banking Group exposed some customers' payment and transaction data to other users via the bank's apps.

- **[Fintech is making credit cards weirder](https://workweek.com/2022/08/05/fintech-is-making-credit-cards-weirder/)** — *Hacker News* — Fintech innovation is reshaping credit card products with novel reward structures, underwriting models, and embedded features that challenge traditional card norms.

- **[Open Banking and Payments Competition](https://www.bitsaboutmoney.com/archive/open-banking-and-payments-competition/)** — *Hacker News* — A deep dive into how open banking frameworks are reshaping competition in the payments landscape and what it means for consumers and financial institutions.

---

## 🍁 Top 5 Canadian Fintech News

- **[Canada calls screen scraping 'unsecure,' sets Open Banking target for 2023](https://finledger.com/2021/08/09/canada-sets-open-banking-target-for-2023/)** — *Hacker News* — Canada signalled a clear move toward formal open banking by declaring screen scraping insecure and setting a national implementation timeline — directly relevant as Canada's open banking framework continues to evolve in 2026.

- **[BDC expands Defence Platform to $6 billion and names a StrongNorth Fund leader](https://betakit.com/bdc-expands-defence-platform-to-6-billion-and-names-a-strongnorth-fund-leader/)** — *BetaKit* — The Business Development Bank of Canada is significantly scaling its investment capacity, including leadership appointments for the StrongNorth Fund, signalling major federal capital deployment into Canadian tech ecosystems.

- **[Ontario Teachers' venture growth portfolio posts 30 percent gains in 2025](https://betakit.com/ontario-teachers-venture-growth-portfolio-posts-30-percent-return-in-2025/)** — *BetaKit* — Ontario Teachers' Pension Plan's venture and growth portfolio delivered a 30% return in 2025, underscoring strong institutional appetite for Canadian tech and fintech investments.

- **[Alan raises fresh funding as it entrenches in Canada](https://betakit.com/alan-raises-fresh-funding-as-it-entrenches-in-canada/)** — *BetaKit* — European digital health insurer Alan has secured new funding as it deepens its Canadian market presence, reflecting growing embedded finance and insurtech activity north of the border.

- **[Orion Digital Reports Q4 and Full-Year 2025 Results; Wealth Revenue Grows 36% as Subscription & Services Reach 62% of Revenue](https://financialpost.com/pmn/business-wire-news-releases-pmn/orion-digital-reports-q4-and-full-year-2025-results-wealth-revenue-grows-36-as-subscription-services-reach-62-of-revenue)** — *Financial Post* — Orion Digital reported strong 2025 results with wealth revenue up 36% and European payments volume growing 14%, highlighting the momentum in digital wealth and payments platforms.

---

## 🌊 Bonus: Relevant to Atlantic Fintech's Focus (1–3 articles)

- **[Apple acquires UK open banking startup Credit Kudos](https://ffnews.com/newsarticle/apple-acquires-uk-open-banking-startup-credit-kudos/)** — *Hacker News* — Apple's acquisition of open banking startup Credit Kudos signals Big Tech's growing interest in financial data infrastructure, with implications for how open banking competition may unfold in Canada.

- **[Fintech dystopia](https://fintechdystopia.com/)** — *Hacker News* — A critical look at the darker consequences of fintech expansion — including exclusion, surveillance, and predatory products — a timely lens for Atlantic Fintech's financial inclusion mandate.

- **[Xanadu in talks with government over potential $390 million for domestic quantum manufacturing](https://betakit.com/xanadu-in-talks-with-government-over-potential-390-million-for-domestic-quantum-manufacturing/)** — *BetaKit* — Canadian quantum computing company Xanadu is in advanced discussions for significant federal funding, a signal of Canada's deepening investment in emerging tech infrastructure that could intersect with future fintech security and payments innovation.
